page_metadata.biotools__summary: CyGenexpi is a Cytoscape plugin for validating/inferring genetic networks from time series expression data. It is based on a ordinary differential equation (ODE) model of gene regulation.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CyGenexpi is a Cytoscape plugin for validating/inferring genetic networks from time series expression data. It is based on a ordinary differential equation (ODE) model of gene regulation.
